column1: # drive_name: unique label printed on the drive.
# home_venue_code: venue_code the drive belongs to (leave blank for inspector drives).
# status: In DVR | In Maintenance possession | With Inspector | In transit to Inspector | In transit to Maintenance

column2: which venue is the drive currently installed in (defaults to home_venue_code).

column1: # installed_date: date the drive was installed in current_venue_code (format YYYY-MM-DD). Default 2026-01-01.
# holder_email: email of the maintenance/inspector user currently holding the drive (leave blank if "In DVR").
